violations.text: The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Manager is a trained Food Safety Manager. Manager must be registered with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2025

Milk Case one was observed held at 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk was moved to milk case holding ambient of 36DF. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must register FSM with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Corrective Action - Establishment is to register the Serve Safe Manager with the RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2 door true unit. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024

The establishment has a Serve safe employee not registered with the RIDOH-CFP. Employee must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as Certified Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the bottom of the refrigerator and 2 door reach-in freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. FMC Application given to person in charge. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

Deli-cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the reach-in freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -Establishment shall register a ServSafe certified employee as the Certified Food Safety Manager with RIDOH Center for Food Protection (RI license). -Application provided to establishment at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the can opener during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2023
